info.title: Event Platform API
info.description:
Multi-tenant event platform API.

- **Global routes** (`/api/...`) — authentication and platform (super admin) endpoints.
- **Tenant routes** (`/api/tenant/...`) — resolved via the venue subdomain; every endpoint
  below this prefix is scoped to the authenticated user's venue.

All mutating endpoints follow the `FormRequest → DTO → Service → ApiResource → ApiResponse`
pipeline. **OpenAPI schemas in `app/OpenApi/` are a read-only projection** of that contract —
FormRequest + ApiResource + DTO remain the source of truth; update both in the same commit.

get.description: Public, unauthenticated catalog of published events for the current venue context. Only events with status `published` are included. No Authorization header is required.
Public, unauthenticated detail for a single published event in the current venue context. Draft, cancelled, and completed events return 404. No Authorization header is required.

post.description: Public, unauthenticated order creation for a published event in the current venue context. Guests cannot set customer_user_id or reservation_id. Rate limited to 10 requests per minute per IP. No Authorization header is required.

Public, unauthenticated payment instructions for a pending order identified by order_number. Rate limited to 10 requests per minute per IP. No Authorization header is required. Does not expose numeric payment ids.

404.description: Order not found, not pending, or not in this venue

post.summary: Verify guest payment by transaction number
post.description: Public, unauthenticated verification of a wallet transfer for a pending order. Looks up the latest awaiting_transfer/verifying payment internally — payment ids are never accepted from the client. Rate limited to 10 requests per minute per IP.

404.description: Order or active payment instruction not found

message.description: Generic API error envelope returned by `ApiExceptionRenderer`.
Validation error envelope returned by Laravel `ValidationException` handler.

CreatePublicOrderRequest.description: Guest checkout payload. customer_user_id and reservation_id are not accepted.

event_id.description: Must reference a published event in the current venue.

transaction_number.description: Wallet provider transfer reference submitted by the guest.

payload.description: Visible only to users with orders.manage permission.

PublicEventDetailItem.description: Public catalog detail projection of a published event for anonymous visitors.

description.example: A short teaser description for the catalog listing.

PublicEventListItem.description: Public catalog projection of a published event for anonymous visitors. Intentionally separate from tenant EventResource.

description.example: A short teaser description for the catalog listing.

amount.description: Decimal amount as string (consistent with other money schemas in this spec).

PublicOrderResource.description: Limited public projection of a guest-created order. Internal financial fields are omitted.

PublicPaymentInstructionResource.description: Guest-facing payment instructions. Numeric payment and account ids are intentionally omitted.

provider.description: Wallet brand label for the guest.

PublicPaymentVerificationResource.description: Guest-facing verification outcome. Internal payment fields are omitted.

sanctum.description: Laravel Sanctum bearer token. Obtain via /api/auth/login or /api/tenant/auth/login.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Registration, login, tokens, password reset, email verification

tags.name: Platform
tags.description: Tax rates (tenant-scoped) and platform settings (global, super admin)
